sections.heading: TKD Job Prompt Pack
sections.prose:
- Scope: scheduler/worker stability, queue contracts, job metrics.
- Core prompt: Add a job workflow with retries, dead-letter handling, and idempotency checks.
- Small tasks: define job contract -> implement worker -> failure tests -> docs.

items.text: Scope: scheduler/worker stability, queue contracts, job metrics.
Core prompt: Add a job workflow with retries, dead-letter handling, and idempotency checks.
Small tasks: define job contract -> implement worker -> failure tests -> docs.
